Bash(cd "Q:/Claudework/bridge base" && python -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('master.db'\)

print\('=== jobs 테이블 ==='\)
print\('총 건수:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM jobs'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('고유 코드:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT job_code\) FROM jobs'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('중복\(seq>1\):', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM jobs WHERE seq > 1'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('파트타임:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM jobs WHERE is_part_time=1'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 급여 있는 건 ==='\)
print\('salary_min 있음:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM jobs WHERE salary_min IS NOT NULL'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 상위 5건 샘플 ==='\)
rows = conn.execute\('SELECT job_code, seq, city, start_date, salary_min, salary_max FROM jobs LIMIT 5'\).fetchall\(\)
for r in rows:
    print\(r\)

print\(\)
print\('=== client_inquiries 테이블 ==='\)
print\('총 건수:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM client_inquiries'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('구CSV:', conn.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM client_inquiries WHERE source_file='BRIDGE_clients_data.csv'\\"\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('신CSV:', conn.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM client_inquiries WHERE source_file='BRIDGE_clients_data_New.csv'\\"\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 신CSV 학교명 ==='\)
rows = conn.execute\(\\"SELECT school_name, location, salary_raw FROM client_inquiries WHERE source_file='BRIDGE_clients_data_New.csv'\\"\).fetchall\(\)
for r in rows:
    print\(r\)

conn.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

feat: admin password login + Render wake-up retry

Backend:
- POST /api/admin/login: validate ADMIN_PASSWORD, return ADMIN_API_KEY
- HMAC exempt for /api/admin/login \(no signature needed to login\)
- Rate limited: 10 attempts per 5 minutes

Frontend:
- AdminAuth: password prompt → server login → get API key → store in session
- useAdminAuth: fetchWithWake\(\) retries 3x on network failure \(Render sleep\)
- adminFetch\(\): GET wrapper with wake-up + auto x-admin-key header
- All 13 admin pages updated to new auth pattern \(waking prop\)
- "서버 깨우는 중..." display during Render cold start

No changes to public-facing pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push 2>&1)

Bash(cd "Q:/Claudework/ClaudeBlog" && .venv/Scripts/python -c "
import json, time
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options
from pathlib import Path

opts = Options\(\)
opts.add_argument\('--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled'\)
opts.add_experimental_option\('excludeSwitches', ['enable-automation']\)
driver = webdriver.Chrome\(options=opts\)
driver.get\('https://nid.naver.com/nidlogin.login'\)
print\('네이버 로그인 하세요. 완료 후 엔터...'\)
input\(\)
cookies = driver.get_cookies\(\)
Path\('logs'\).mkdir\(exist_ok=True\)
Path\('logs/naver_cookies.json'\).write_text\(json.dumps\(cookies, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\), encoding='utf-8'\)
print\(f'쿠키 저장 완료: {len\(cookies\)}개'\)
driver.quit\(\)
" 2>&1)

import json, time
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options
from pathlib import Path

opts = Options\(\)
opts.add_argument\(\\"--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled\\"\)
opts.add_experimental_option\(\\"excludeSwitches\\", [\\"enable-automation\\"]\)
driver = webdriver.Chrome\(options=opts\)
driver.get\(\\"https://nid.naver.com/nidlogin.login\\"\)
print\(\\"네이버 로그인 하세요. 완료 후 엔터...\\"\)
input\(\)
cookies = driver.get_cookies\(\)
Path\(\\"logs\\"\).mkdir\(exist_ok=True\)
Path\(\\"logs/naver_cookies.json\\"\).write_text\(json.dumps\(cookies, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\), encoding=\\"utf-8\\"\)
print\(f\\"쿠키 저장 완료: {len\(cookies\)}개\\"\)
driver.quit\(\)
''', encoding='utf-8'\)
print\('save_naver_session.py 생성 완료'\)
" 2>&1)
